fullText: i just infiltrated AI into over 20 businesses in the last few months Here's what nobody told you about what actually works Now every one of them came to us saying the same thing We tried CHBT We tested other AI tools We watched the tutorials and other AI strategies And the problem was always the same They were using AI like a chatbot instead of building it into how their business actually ran So here's what we did instead We went inside each business We found where the team was bleeding the most time Whether that was follow-up slipping through the cracks or reports eating up the whole morning or even onboarding dragging on for days And then we built an AI layer directly into those workflows Not a separate tab not another tool to check It just ran inside what they already used One company they cut client onboarding from 3 days to 4 hours Another one automated their entire lead follow-up and started closing deals that they were just flatout losing because nobody got back fast enough So if you're running a business and you know that there's a better way to use AI but you haven't figured out what that actually looks like yet I'm hosting a free live workshop where I'm going to be breaking down how we actually built these AI layers step by step Come at workshop and I'll send you the link to register
